execution_log.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y meson ninja-build gcc g++ pkg-config libboost-all-dev libdbus-1-dev libglib2.0-dev libgtest-dev
execution_log.output: All packages installed successfully. Boost 1.83.0, GCC 13.3.0, Meson 1.3.2, GTest 1.14.0
Build targets in project: 28. Subprojects: mcbase: YES. Found ninja-1.11.1. Lua not found (skipped), securec not found (using built-in)
[372/372] Linking target tests/libmcpp_test. Build completed in 3m12s (real 192s)
2/2 tests passed. mcbase unit tests: OK (16.71s). libmcpp unit tests: OK (16.64s). Total test time: 33.6s
Plugin example ran successfully. 3 services initialized, started, and stopped properly. Duration: 0.2s
Interprocess example completed successfully. Shared memory, mutex, rw-lock tests all passed with multi-process correctness verified. Duration: 4.5s
Task service started successfully with dbus daemon. Long-running daemon process (event loop), verified it starts without errors. Duration: <30s before manual stop

All module tests passed: devices, network, protocol (init.so mode), database (deep path), two-stage unload verification. Program segfaulted on exit during cleanup (EXIT CODE 0 but core dumped). Duration: 0.1s

execution_log.command: docker stop ttfhw-libmcpp-env && docker rm ttfhw-libmcpp-env

process_timeline.action: 验证过程启动 - 读取文档并分析构建依赖
完成文档阅读 - 提取了依赖、构建命令、测试命令、样例命令
安装构建依赖: meson, ninja, gcc, g++, boost, dbus, glib, gtest
运行2个测试套件 (mcbase + libmcpp) 全部通过 (耗时33.6秒)
运行4个样例程序: plugin(OK), interprocess(OK), task_service(starts OK), module_test(OK but segfault on exit)

documentation_gaps: README中未明确列出 dbus-1 和 glib-2.0 为依赖，仅在 meson.build 中通过 find_package 发现
README中未提及 meson 构建系统本身的安装要求（仅提到 'Meson 构建系统 (0.56+)' 但未给出 apt 安装命令
README中给出了 libgtest-dev 安装但未说明 Ubuntu 上需要额外编译 gtest 源码（本次验证中 pkg-config 可直接找到）
Lua 依赖未在任何文档中明确说明为可选依赖
README中未提及 mcbase 子项目作为内部依赖

problems_encountered.problem: Docker Hub 拉取 ubuntu:24.04 镜像失败（连接重置）
problems_encountered.solution: 本地已有缓存镜像 ubuntu:24.04 (c4a8d5503dfb)，直接使用本地镜像

problems_encountered.problem: Meson setup 时 Lua 依赖未找到
problems_encountered.solution: Lua 是可选依赖，meson.build 中已处理：'Lua not found, Lua modules will not be built' 和 'Lua tests will be skipped'，不影响构建
problems_encountered.source: meson.build 第97行 dbus_dep 附近 + src/luaclib/meson.build 第139行

problems_encountered.solution: securec 是可选特性，mcbase 使用内建实现回退。'mcbase 使用内建 securec'
problems_encountered.source: libraries/mcbase/meson.build 第42-48行 + meson_options.txt securec option

problems_encountered.problem: module_test_example 样例程序在所有测试通过后退出时发生段错误 (SIGSEGV)
problems_encountered.solution: 程序正常功能测试全部通过 (EXIT CODE 0)，段错误发生在退出时的清理阶段。可能是静态/共享库卸载顺序或全局对象析构问题。此问题不影响构建和测试验证结果。
